testCases.label: Verify get_user_input_string returns a string without extra output
testCases.description: Checks that get_user_input_string returns the mocked input 'John' and that no additional text is printed, as required by the lab’s string-input function.

testCases.label: Verify get_user_input_integer validates and converts integer input
testCases.description: Ensures that get_user_input_integer handles invalid input ('abc'), prints an appropriate error message, and ultimately returns the valid integer 25.

testCases.label: Verify get_user_input_float validates and converts float input
testCases.description: Confirms that get_user_input_float responds to invalid input ('abc') with the correct error message and returns the valid float 25.5, matching the lab’s input-validation requirements.
